nasb.text: Then I said, “They are only the poor, They are foolish; For they do not know the way of the Lord Or the ordinance of their God.

esv.text: Then I said, “These are only the poor; they have no sense; for they do not know the way of the Lord, the justice of their God.

cnv.text: 我說：“這些人只是貧窮小民， 為人愚昧； 他們不曉得耶和華的道路， 也不明白他們　神的法則。

ccb.text: 我想：“他们贫穷、愚昧， 不明白他们上帝耶和华的道， 也不知道祂的法令。
